summary: Executed V0.8 Root README Overhaul. Rewrote the English README.md and introduced a Chinese README_zh-CN.md. Both landing pages now feature an open-source standard layout detailing the 'Problem vs Solution' narrative, the Conceptual Triumvirate, core features (DAG engine, Dual-Tiered Sync), a concrete quickstart/installation guide, and a Mermaid architecture diagram. Links explicitly point to the GitBook documentation portal in EN/ZH.
